name: TOI Central Asian Restaurant HALAL
address: 157 Bà Huyện Thanh Quan, Ngũ Hành Sơn, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam
hours_note: Closed Tuesdays. Open 1 to 9 PM all other days.

reviews.author: Madina Batyrbaeva
reviews.text: Manty like at home. Warm salads, laghman, everything tasted right. Clean room, good service, Kazakh music playing. We will be back.

reviews.author: Rbm
reviews.text: Clean, spacious, elegant. The laghman tasted better than what I miss from Kazakhstan. Try the guyru laghman. Flatbread was soft and fresh. Wish I had found this place earlier.

reviews.author: Elena Wolf
reviews.text: We ordered manti, shashlik, kazan kebab, samsa, and honey cake. Everything homemade and delicious. Gave it 11 out of 10.

reviews.author: Aigerim Auketayeva
reviews.text: Living in Vietnam, I miss home cooking. At TOI the portions are generous, lots of meat, and it tastes like a home kitchen, not a generic restaurant. The owners cook like it is for their own table.

reviews.author: Aleksandr Panchenkov
reviews.text: Started with the lamb plov: well spiced, not dry, not greasy, good portion. Came back for kazan kebab lamb and samsa in flaky pastry. Both excellent.

reviews.author: Pasha
reviews.text: Staff made us feel like guests, not customers. The plov is one of the best we have had. Manti juicy and perfectly steamed. New, clean, cozy room. Already planning to return.

reviews.author: Vladimir Volkov
reviews.text: Warm, clean, smells like home. Manti full of juice, huge portion. My husband finished the plov. We ordered ayran and baursak twice. Honey cake disappeared spoon by spoon.

reviews.author: Assem Tassiyeva
reviews.text: Beautiful warm room. Baursak and borscht were excellent. Everything tasted fresh and well made.

reviews.author: Madina Ukubas
reviews.text: Tried the Shirin salad: finally a proper vegetarian option. Warm meat salad too. Eggplant crispy outside, soft inside. Incredibly good.

reviews.author: Suleyman Tutus
reviews.text: Large menu, generous portions, cooked to order. Laghman and manti were both excellent.

reviews.author: Traveler
reviews.text: Stopped here after Dalat craving Central Asian food. Plov not greasy, good meat, fair prices. Fresh achichuk and baursak with kaymak. Minimalist Kazakh interior, felt like home.

reviews.author: Madina M
reviews.text: Lagman, shorpa, baursak, Caesar salad, samsa, and Tashkent tea. Baursak a little firm but everything else was great. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Dean H
reviews.text: Came twice. Great prices and quality. Manti were excellent. Achichuk on point. Will return for the eggplant salad.

reviews.author: Ilyas Mamyshev
reviews.text: Best manti in Vietnam, and we know manti. Flatbread and shorpa sauce taste like home. Compote perfect in this heat. Thank you to the team.

reviews.author: Bakytgul Tuyakbaeva
reviews.text: Shorpa and manti were fantastic. Thank you for feeding us so well. Wishing the team success.

owner_provided_notes: Halal Central Asian restaurant on Bà Huyện Thanh Quan. Plov, laghman, manti, and tea in a charcoal and gold room.
headline: Plov, laghman, and manti. Halal Central Asian on Bà Huyện Thanh Quan
